changes.value:
**File:** `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/displays/badge-list-display.tsx:26-28`

```ts
const isComputedTags = field.type.kind === "computed" && (field.type as Record<string, unknown>).derive === "parse-body-tags";
```

Same pattern as multi-select-editor — hardcodes detection of computed tag fields to determine how to resolve and display values. Uses type cast to access `derive`. Should use field-level config to know the target entity type.
